# category

**Instance Property**

Access the category of the activity.

## Declaration

```swift
var category: ActivityCategory
```

## Discussion

Your device activity report extension can access the category’s [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ManagedSettings/ActivityCategory/localizedDisplayName].
